arts.ttl: PSG on the brink of Champions League embarrassment
arts.sum: “I hope to have other more important games, but this is a special game because in the new format of the Champions League I don’t think anyone could predict that City would have this number of points ahead of match day seven.” “I hope the most important match is not the one against Manchester City, I hope it will be in the next phase of the competition at a very high level with the trophy at stake,” Luis Enrique explained.

arts.ttl: Man City's 116th charge? New signing accused of 'breaking contract'
arts.sum: Incoming Manchester City signing Juma Bah has been accused of 'unilaterally breaking his contract.' "Abdulai Juma Bah and his agent informed Real Valladolid yesterday afternoon of their intention to unilaterally break the contract that binds both parties.

arts.ttl: Paris Saint-Germain v Manchester City: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off in Paris Live scores | Sign up for Football Daily | Email Michael Should mention that Brest, the surprise team of this league phase, are currently 2-0 down away at Shakhtar. It may be that the French side have to settle for a play-off, rather than the top eight. Fábian Ruiz, who scored the winner in PSG’s 2-1 comback win at Lens at the weekend, is one of two PSG players that will miss the next (and final) league phase match if he is booked tonight, Nuno Mendes is the other. The Portuguese wing-back is so important in Luis Enrique’s preferred 3-4-3 formation, so it’s important that he stays out of the referee’s book tonight, from a PSG perspective. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: PSG vs Manchester City - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as the Citizens bid to get back on track in Europe plus updates from Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as PSG host Man City at the Parc des Princes plus updates from Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Swedish talent waiting for Manchester City offer as he gets ready to move
arts.sum: Swedish talent Matias Siltanen is close to a move to Djurgården but is also hoping for an offer to Manchester City to arrive before he makes it. That’s according to Fotboll Skanalen, who cover comments from the 17-year-old today as he gets ready to move. arts.ttl: Man City transfer approach sparks furious response as La Liga club threaten legal action
arts.sum: Manchester City have been accused of 'advising' Real Valladolid defender Juma Bah to break his contract in order to force through a move to the Premier League champions

arts.ttl: Man City accused of encouraging Juma Bah to buy out Real Valladolid contract
arts.sum: La Liga club Real Valladolid accuse Manchester City of encouraging defender Juma Bah to terminate his contract ahead of a potential move to the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Could Man United complete stunning deal for Man City attacker this summer?
arts.sum: Manchester United allegedly consider making a surprise move for Manchester City attacker Jack Grealish during this summer's transfer window.
